---
title: "About"
---

### [About Me]{.glow-blue}
Hi! I'm a data scientist who enjoys understanding how things work, especially when it comes to Machine Learning, AI and technology.<br>
I started this blog as a place to document my learning journey and share concepts in a simple, intuitive way.
The goal is not just to memorize formulas, but to build a deeper understanding of the ideas behind them.
<br>
<br>
Whether you are learning these topics for the first time or revisiting them after years, I hope this blog helps make complex ideas feel a little more approachable.
